title: The Half-Way Girl
writer: Joseph F. Poland, E. Lloyd Sheldon, Earle Snell
actors: Doris Kenyon, Lloyd Hughes, Hobart Bosworth
plot: When her traveling theatrical group goes broke, Poppy, an actress in the troupe, finds herself stranded in Singapore. She's reduced to working in a bar in the seedy part of town as a "hostess", where she meets a down-on-his-luck E...
